security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://cdn-lfs.huggingface.co; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
